channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Raiders player Charles Snowden facing misdemeanor DUI charge after Las Vegas arrest
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Las Vegas officers found Raiders football player Charles Snowden “passed out” behind the wheel of a Jeep Cherokee, its engine running as it balanced atop a retaining wall, before his arrest on a misdemeanor charge of driving under the influence of alcohol, according to a police repo
item.dc:creator: KEN RITTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State athletic director 'absolutely' confident Ryan Day will return next season
item.description: The calls for Ryan Day to be fired in Columbus are louder than ever, but Ohio State athletic director Ross Bjork isn't exactly listening to them.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL world reacts with excitement, surprise, questions after Bill Belichick is hired to coach UNC
item.description: Minutes after the University of North Carolina announced it had hired Bill Belichick as its next head football coach, the Tar Heels’ Instagram account posted a photo of the legendary NFL coach — at no more than 3 years old — sitting in the UNC bleachers.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 29 CMU football student-athletes make RMAC All-Academic list
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Rocky Mountain Athletic Conference unveiled its All-Academic Team for football on Tuesday afternoon. Colorado Mesa University was well-represented, with 29 student-athletes receiving recognition, including five First Team honorees and one major award winner.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Team claims NASCAR rescinded approval to buy new charter unless federal antitrust suit is dropped
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Front Row Motorsports, one of two teams suing NASCAR in federal court, accused the stock car series Thursday of rejecting the planned purchase of a valuable charter unless the lawsuit was dropped.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 2034 World Cup visitors will live in 'a bubble' and not see real life, Saudi rights activist says
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Soccer fans visiting Saudi Arabia for the 2034 World Cup will live in a “bubble” during the tournament that does not reflect real life there, a Saudi rights activist warned on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Soccer icon Alex Morgan makes waves for Rady Children’s Giveathon: how to help
item.description: This holiday season, former San Diego Wave FC star Alex Morgan is spreading some cheer by way of her foundation and support of the annual iHeart Rady Children’s Giveathon.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Wander Franco's sex abuse trial has been postponed 5 months
item.description: PUERTO PLATA, Dominican Republic (AP) — The trial against Tampa Bay Rays shortstop Wander Franco, who has been charged with sexually abusing a minor, sexual and commercial exploitation against a minor, and human trafficking, was postponed on Thursday and scheduled to resume June 2, 2025.
item.dc:creator: MARTIN ADAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Skins Game to make return to Thanksgiving week with a modern look
item.description: A modern version of The Skins Game is returning to Thanksgiving week. Pro Shop, the new golf media company led by “Full Swing” executive producer Chad Mumm, on Thursday announced a deal with the PGA Tour that brings back The Skins Game for the first time since 2008.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill Belichick, University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill finalize coaching deal: reports
item.description: Bill Belichick has reportedly been tapped as the next head coach for the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Patrick Mahomes bashes NFL for making Chiefs play on Christmas Day
item.description: Patrick Mahomes spoke out against the NFL's decision to schedule three games in 11 days for the Chiefs, including a Christmas Day contest.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: OF Mike Tauchman joins the Chicago White Sox with $1.95 million, 1-year contract
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Mike Tauchman is switching sides in Chicago. Chicago announced a $1.95 million, one-year contract for the outfielder on Wednesday. Tauchman, 34, grew up in Palatine, Illinois, about 35 miles northwest of Chicago, and played college ball for Bradley in Peoria, Illinois.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Suzuki in trade talks with Astros for Kyle Tucker
item.description: CHICAGO— The hot stove is heading up for the Chicago Cubs during the 2024 Winter Meetings and the club is reportedly in trade talks for one of the best outfielders in baseball — Kyle Tucker.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Ohio lawmaker proposes bill to make ‘flag planting’ in Ohio State stadium a felony
item.description: Days after the postgame melee between the Michigan and Ohio State football teams, an Ohio state lawmaker has introduced a new bill that would make “flag planting” within Ohio Stadium a felony criminal offense.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC loses to Minnesota in shootout, 5-4
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Marcus Johansson had a goal and two assists for the Minnesota Wild, who rallied for a 5-4 shootout win against the Utah Hockey Club at Delta Center on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Joe Burrow's home broken into during Monday Night Football
item.description: Bengals quarterback Joe Burrow's home was broken into during Monday Night Football in the latest home invasion of a pro athlete in the U.S., authorities said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: SJ Earthquakes welcome 3 new players in deadline trade
item.description: (KRON) – Three players have been traded to the San Jose Earthquakes, the team announced Monday. Defender Dave Romney and midfielders Ian Harkes and Mark-Anthony Kaye will be making their way to Silicon Valley from the New England Revolution.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Joe Burrow's home reportedly broken in to Monday night during game
item.description: According to WLWT, Joe Burrow's Anderson Township, Ohio home was broken into and confirmed by the Hamilton County Sheriff's Office.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Miami's Ward, Oregon's Gabriel, Colorado's Hunter, Boise State’s Jeanty, are named Heisman finalists
item.description: Oregon's Dillon Gabriel, Colorado's Travis Hunter, Boise State’s Ashton Jeanty, and Miami's Cam Ward were announced as the Heisman Trophy finalists on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON AP College Football Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Arlington Heights village board unanimously approves tax deal with Bears, 3 local school districts
item.description: The Village of Arlington Heights Board of Trustees is set to vote on a tentative property tax deal with the Chicago Bears and three local school districts, which would save the Bears $5.4 million a year in property taxes and establish a timeline for the Bears to decide on building a new stadium in t
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox announce MLB coaching staff under first-year manager Will Venable
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have finalized their 2025 Major League coaching staff, adding two new faces in bench coach Walker McKinven and assistant hitting coach Joel McKeithan, and retaining the rest of the staff from the 2024 season.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: How to watch 'Monday Night Football' in 'The Simpsons' universe
item.description: The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Utah HC beats Flyers to sweep East Coast road trip
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time since the first week of the NHL season, the Utah Hockey Club has won back-to-back games, and they did it on back-to-back nights.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tourigny wins 100th game as Utah HC beats Buffalo, 5-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Michael Kesselring had a goal and an assist for the Utah Hockey Club, which handed the Buffalo Sabres their sixth straight loss with a 5-2 win at KeyBank Center on Saturday. "It's good for the confidence," Kesselring said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
